comments.LineComment: | Step-by-step guided tours with element highlighting and tooltips.

value.value: tour-navigation flex items-center gap-2 bg-popover rounded-lg p-2 shadow-lg border
tour-skip px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors
tour-prev px-3 py-1.5 text-sm rounded-md border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent transition-colors
tour-next px-3 py-1.5 text-sm rounded-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors
tour-highlight fixed ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2 rounded-md transition-all pointer-events-none z-[55]
tour-tooltip-arrow absolute w-3 h-3 bg-popover border-r border-b
tour-tooltip fixed bg-popover text-popover-foreground rounded-lg shadow-lg border p-4 max-w-sm z-[60]
tour-footer fixed bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex flex-col items-center gap-2
